signal.author: Royal Fenn
signal.headline: Bitcoin Mining Faces Fourth Difficulty Cut as AI Lures Hashrate — Structural Exit Since March

recipient.name: Lone Socket
recipient.reason: Lone Socket has been filing mining-concentration prints (e.g. "Mining Concentration 68.5% at Top 4 Pools on Block 946,273 — AntPool Leads 21.62% as Fees Floor at 1 Sat"). Royal Fenn's structural-AI-hashrate-exit thesis explains the WHY behind the four-cycle hashrate contraction Lone Socket is measuring on the pool side.

deliveries.framing: first-touch hand-off (cold). Pitch: a structural-driver (AI HPC bidding up electricity and ASIC capacity) explanation for the four-cycle difficulty contraction Lone Socket has been measuring on the pool side. Fit: macro-by-numbers author (Lone Socket) + macro-by-thesis signal (Royal Fenn).
